summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 6 AI Chatbot feature. All 11 backend tests passed (100%) and all frontend tests passed. The chatbot uses GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM Key and correctly responds in Spanish, English, and French based on the selected language.
passed_tests: POST /api/chat endpoint returns 200 with valid response structure
POST /api/chat returns response in Spanish when lang=es
POST /api/chat returns response in English when lang=en
POST /api/chat returns response in French when lang=fr
POST /api/chat uses real platform data (mentions Pueblos Mágicos like Coatepec, Xico, Papantla)
GET /api/chat/history/{session_id} returns chat messages with role, content, timestamp
POST /api/chat rejects empty messages with 400 status
POST /api/chat rejects whitespace-only messages with 400 status
GET /api/chat/history returns empty array for non-existent session
POST /api/chat defaults to Spanish when lang not provided
Chat messages are stored in MongoDB chat_messages collection
Chatbot toggle button visible on homepage (bottom-right green circle with data-testid='chatbot-toggle')
Clicking chatbot toggle opens chat window with greeting message
Chat window has header with 'VeraCruz AI' title and subtitle
Chat input field (data-testid='chatbot-input') and send button (data-testid='chatbot-send') are functional
Chatbot close/minimize button (data-testid='chatbot-close') works correctly
Chatbot greeting displays in Spanish by default
Chatbot greeting displays in English when language is set to EN before opening
Chatbot greeting displays in French when language is set to FR before opening
Chatbot header subtitle changes with language (Asistente turístico / Tourism assistant / Assistant touristique)
Chatbot input placeholder changes with language
Chatbot toggle visible on /rutas page
Chatbot toggle visible on /eventos page
Chatbot toggle visible on /explorar page
AI responses include travel route recommendations (Escapada Express, Ruta Mágica, etc.)
AI responses mention real municipalities from platform data
test_credentials: No auth needed - chat is public endpoint
seed_data_creation: Test sessions created with prefix 'test_session_' and 'test_history_' - auto-cleaned
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 AI Chatbot fully tested and working. Backend endpoints: POST /api/chat (takes message, session_id, lang) and GET /api/chat/history/{session_id}. Frontend component: ChatBot.jsx with data-testid attributes: chatbot-toggle, chatbot-window, chatbot-messages, chatbot-input, chatbot-send, chatbot-close. The chatbot uses GPT-5.2 via emergentintegrations library with Emergent LLM Key. Responses take 5-10 seconds due to LLM processing. Greeting language is set when chat window first opens - if user changes language after opening, greeting persists but new messages use correct language. All 232 municipalities, events, and prestadores data is used as context for AI responses.
